name: Belief
additional_info: All of your Medium Weapon Mantras gain a second damage instance that scales directly on your Willpower investment and deals physical damage. This deals 0.15 damage per 1 Willpower investment, up to 15 damage at 100 Willpower or 15.45 at 103 Willpower. This has no cooldown.
desc: Your medium weapon mantras now deal extra damage based on how much Willpower you have.
